title: Guest Lecturer, Environmental Policy
description: Bayview Community College seeks experienced practitioners to deliver guest lectures on environmental and land-management policy for its continuing-education program.

title: Policy Advisory Board Member (Volunteer)
description: The Chesapeake Bay Foundation is recruiting retired policy and regulatory professionals to advise on watershed and shoreline-management initiatives.

title: Adult Literacy and GED Tutor (Volunteer)
description: The Annapolis Public Library is seeking volunteer tutors to support adult learners preparing for the GED examination on weekday mornings.

title: Contributing Columnist, Community Voices
description: The Capital Gazette invites regional experts to contribute occasional opinion columns on local government, environment, and community affairs.

title: Land Conservation Policy Consultant
description: A public-lands program seeks a part-time consultant with federal land-management experience to review draft policy and regulatory guidance.

title: Community History Program Facilitator (Volunteer)
description: The Annapolis Public Library seeks a volunteer facilitator to lead a monthly community program on regional and American history for adult audiences.
